category_sources: source_facts.description identifies Stanford NLP Group's Named Entity Recognizer; official CoreNLP NER documentation covers Stanford NER.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is stanford-ner; official documentation page title is Named Entity Recognizer and refers to Stanford NER.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is Stanford's official CRF-NER page; official CoreNLP docs include specific NER and CRF NER pages.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official CoreNLP NER page references NER source/examples in the stanfordnlp/CoreNLP GitHub repository rather than a separate stanford-ner repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official Stanford NER/CoreNLP documentation identify the tool as a CRF-based named entity recognizer with command-line and Java API use.
